creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text: Apparently the tree was updated and the latest snapshot correct because today I deleted the portsnap database and the ports tree and ran "portsnap auto" and got a ports tree with no errors. This seems to indicate there was an upstream issue that has since been resolved (at least for this particular incident). But if it is an upstream issue, I am still concerned because of how frequently it has been occurring over the past few months.
